title: libblockdev bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.2.0-5.0.1]
- enable btrfs support [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.2.0-5]
- Don't allow suid and dev set on fs resize
  Resolves: RHEL-96031

[3.2.0-3]
- crypto: Add a function to set persistent flags for LUKS
  Resolves: RHEL-82885

[3.2.0-2]
- nvme: Avoid element-type g-i annotations
  Resolves: RHEL-66117

[3.2.0-1]
- Update to 3.2.0
  Resolves: RHEL-60272
  Resolves: RHEL-50820

[3.1.0-9]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[3.1.0-8]
- nvme: Add bd_nvme_is_tech_avail to the API file
  Resolves: RHEL-60061

[3.1.0-7]
- Backport libblockdev-smart plugin
  Resolves: RHEL-49675

[3.1.0-6]
- Fix passing size for pvresize over DBus
  Resolves: RHEL-45872
- Upstream kernel VDO support
  Resolves: RHEL-31953

[3.1.0-5]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild
full_text:
[3.2.0-5.0.1]
- enable btrfs support [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.2.0-5]
- Don't allow suid and dev set on fs resize
  Resolves: RHEL-96031

[3.2.0-3]
- crypto: Add a function to set persistent flags for LUKS
  Resolves: RHEL-82885

[3.2.0-2]
- nvme: Avoid element-type g-i annotations
  Resolves: RHEL-66117

[3.2.0-1]
- Update to 3.2.0
  Resolves: RHEL-60272
  Resolves: RHEL-50820

[3.1.0-9]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[3.1.0-8]
- nvme: Add bd_nvme_is_tech_avail to the API file
  Resolves: RHEL-60061

[3.1.0-7]
- Backport libblockdev-smart plugin
  Resolves: RHEL-49675

[3.1.0-6]
- Fix passing size for pvresize over DBus
  Resolves: RHEL-45872
- Upstream kernel VDO support
  Resolves: RHEL-31953

[3.1.0-5]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20428-0.html
